customHtml.title: National Casino: your comfort — rules, security, support
customHtml.description:
Access Rules & Responsible Play: Enjoy with Confidence

Our casino is built for adult players, so access is available only when age requirements are met. We ask you to provide accurate details at registration to streamline payouts and protect your account. In some cases, we perform standard identity checks to keep transactions safe. Your account must remain personal, which means sharing logins or passwords is not allowed. We support fair play and expect everyone to follow promo and bonus terms. Any attempt to misuse offers goes against our principles. We encourage a mindful approach: gaming should stay entertainment, not a financial strategy. To help, we provide limits and self-control tools. We recommend setting a budget and session time in advance to keep a healthy pace. If needed, you can pause, restrict access, or request stronger controls. Our support team is always ready to explain rules and settings.


Access conditions

  • • 18+ only: gameplay is available to adults only.
  • • Accurate details: correct info speeds up verification and payouts.
  • • One account: one player — one profile for clarity.
  • • Promo compliance: bonuses are used under stated terms.

Not allowed

  • • Account sharing: shared access or selling accounts is prohibited.
  • • Fraud attempts: any manipulation, abuse, or rule circumvention.
  • • Unauthorized payments: using someone else’s payment instruments.
  • • Abusive behavior: harassment or pressure toward support/community.

Responsible play

  • • Limits: set deposit and play limits upfront.
  • • Time-out: take breaks if emotions run high.
  • • Self-exclusion: block access for a chosen period if needed.
  • • Stay in control: play calmly and within your budget.

License & Data Protection: Security You Can Trust

We operate within a licensed model and follow core control standards applied to iGaming platforms. A license means our processes are built around clear rules, responsible play, and sound financial discipline. We apply proper user identification principles to protect accounts and transactions. This helps prevent unauthorized access and reduces fraud risks. As a result, you get a stable, predictable environment for play and payouts.


Our personal data protection is embedded into both infrastructure and daily procedures. We use modern encryption protocols during data transmission so information can’t be intercepted by third parties. Access to sensitive details is role-limited and strictly regulated. We minimize data collection to what’s necessary for account service, payments, and compliance requirements. This approach improves privacy and keeps your information under control.


We apply cybersecurity practices that protect your account from both the user side and the platform side. Passwords are handled with secure storage methods, while logins and actions are monitored by security systems. If suspicious activity appears, we can trigger extra checks to keep your funds and access safe. Payment operations run through protected channels with additional control mechanisms. This creates a reliable security perimeter for gameplay and cashier activity.


Our privacy policy explains which data categories we process and why we do it. We clarify how cookies and technical identifiers support stability, personalization, and abuse prevention. You can manage communications and certain privacy settings inside your account. Upon request, we help you understand data retention and adjust contact preferences. We aim to make privacy understandable, not just a formality.


A key part of protection is standard KYC/AML, which helps confirm identity and transaction legitimacy. We may request verification documents to streamline withdrawals and prevent improper activity. These checks are handled securely and used strictly for their intended purpose. Such measures increase payout reliability and protect fair players. In the end, you get a safe ecosystem where it’s comfortable to play and cash out winnings.


Deposits & Withdrawals: Fast Cashier, Confident Security

We designed the cashier to be simple: choose a method, enter the amount, and proceed without extra steps. Deposits are typically credited instantly so you can start playing right after confirmation. Withdrawals are clear and structured: you submit a request, pass standard checks, and we send the payout using your chosen method. To protect transactions, we use encrypted connections and anti-unauthorized-access controls. We support popular payment solutions so you can manage your balance comfortably. Timing depends on the method: e-wallets and crypto often arrive faster, while bank rails can take longer. Keeping your payment details up to date helps speed up processing. When identity confirmation is needed, it protects your account and payouts. You can track request statuses inside your account to stay informed. If you have any questions, support will assist quickly and clearly. We also offer limits and control settings so the cashier remains a comfortable part of your play.


Method Deposit speed Payout after approval

Bank transfer 1–3 business days 2–5 business days

ecoPayz Instant Up to 24h

Limits & amounts

  • • Minimum withdrawal: from €10 (or account-currency equivalent).
  • • Max daily limit: up to €4,000.
  • • Max monthly limit: up to €50,000.

Customer Support: Fast, Polite, Solution-Driven

Our support is built so you get answers quickly, without waiting or unnecessary bureaucracy. We help with registration, login, bonuses, cashier, games, and any account-related questions. Live chat is the fastest channel and works perfectly while you’re playing. Email is ideal for more complex requests, attachments, and detailed explanations. Phone support fits urgent cases when instant communication matters most. We focus on service quality: clear, step-by-step guidance aimed at solving the issue. For payment questions, we explain statuses, timelines, and next actions. For promotions, we guide you through activation and correct completion of terms. We support multiple languages so communication stays comfortable. Inside your account, key sections are easy to find, and support helps you reach the right setting fast. Our goal is to resolve cases in a single contact whenever possible. If a check is needed, we keep you updated at each step.


Contact channels

  • • Live Chat: best for instant in-play questions.
  • • Email: great for detailed requests and documents.
  • • Phone: fast help for urgent clarifications.

Response time & quality

  • • Chat: typically within minutes.
  • • Email: usually within 1–6 hours.
  • • Email: usually within 1–6 hours.

Language availability

  • • Multilingual team: support in popular international languages.
  • • Clear guidance: step-by-step help without jargon.
  • • Outcome-first approach: priority is solving your issue.

customHtml_2.title: Entertainment and Gaming at National Casino
customHtml_2.description:
VIP Loyalty: 15 Levels of Privileges & Personalized Rewards

Our loyalty program is built for players who enjoy consistent play and want real value back. You start at the base tier and unlock new perks as your activity grows. We award loyalty points for wagers in selected game categories, and your progress is tracked inside your account. The best part is that rewards become more noticeable at higher levels: more tailored offers, more bonus options, and better point exchange value. The logic is simple: play — earn — level up — get rewarded. Personalization is key: at higher tiers, you’ll see more individual bonuses aligned with your play style. Service perks also improve, including priority support and faster handling of requests. The program fits both casual sessions and high-limit play because progress reflects activity. Levels unlock additional gifts such as free spins or bonus funds, plus special deposit offers. We value steady play, so VIP often includes recurring perks and seasonal surprises. In your account, you can see your current tier, point balance, and the next milestone. Everything is designed so you feel progression and benefits right away.


Enrollment conditions

  • • Automatic participation: register and start playing.
  • • Verified account: standard verification may be required for expanded perks.
  • • Point earning: points are awarded for wagers (category weighting may vary).

Levels & how to reach them

  • • Levels 1–5: starter perks, regular offers, early level-up rewards.
  • • Levels 6–10: more personalization, better point exchange, stronger promo access.
  • • Levels 11–15: maximum personalization, exclusive gifts, VIP service.
  • • How to level up: play, earn points, join activities—tiers upgrade automatically.

Rewards & perks

  • • Level-up rewards: for example, 10–25 FS early up to 100–200 FS at top tiers.
  • • Cashback: for example, up to 20% during selected periods for active players.
  • • Personal bonuses: for example, offers up to €250 tailored to your deposits and style.
  • • Priority support: faster handling with a personal approach.
  • • Point exchange: better conversion rates as your tier increases.

Bonuses, Promotions & Game Events: More Ways to Win

We keep our promo lineup broad so you can choose offers that match your play style and deposit method. You can begin with a strong welcome pack that boosts early sessions and gives extra chances in slots. Then you can use recurring deposit bonuses to maintain momentum throughout the week. For players who use digital assets, we provide dedicated crypto deposit conditions. If you enjoy higher stakes, our highroller promos scale the value for bigger play. Extra excitement comes from Prize Drops—mechanics with large prize pools shared among active participants. We also run tournaments with cash funds and large free-spin pools where you compete for leaderboard positions. Throughout the month, provider network events add extra missions and prize layers on top of regular play. If you love surprises, we launch secret bonuses and “reward-after-deposit” mechanics. Mini-activities like a fortune wheel add that instant-win feeling. We make sure there’s always something актуal: short promos for quick sessions, weekly reloads, and bigger seasonal campaigns. Clarity matters—terms are stated upfront, and progress can be tracked inside your account. Mobile access stays smooth, so bonuses and tournaments are available in a few taps. New games arrive regularly, often supported by related promos. We support different winning scenarios—from quick drop prizes to end-of-tournament leaderboard rewards. The result is more than a game library: it’s a living ecosystem with ongoing chances to boost your bankroll. Most importantly, there’s always a “next reason” to return: a new drop, a new tournament, a new offer.


Bonuses & offers

  • • Welcome Bonus: 100% up to €100 + 100 Free Spins on your first deposit—strong старт for slots.
  • • Second Deposit Bonus: 50% up to €200 + 50 Free Spins—momentum after deposit one.
  • • Friday Reload Bonus: 50% up to €250 + 100 Free Spins—weekly bankroll refresh.
  • • Crypto First Deposit Bonus: 200% up to €500—extra value for crypto players.
  • • Highroller Bonus: 100% up to €750—built for higher-limit sessions.
  • • Prize Drops: prize pool up to €100,000—earn chances through play in selected titles.
  • • Monthly Tournaments: rewards €30,000 + 30,000 FS—compete for rank and prizes.
  • • Fortune Wheel Bonus: spin-style reward layer after deposits.
  • • Secret Bonus: surprise reward after topping up—extra intrigue and value.
  • • Provider Events (Drops & Wins / BGaming Drops): network campaigns with missions and prizes.

Games at Our Casino: Slots, Live Dealers & More

We built variety so you can switch between fast slot sessions and the atmosphere of a real casino. Slots come with a broad mix of themes, mechanics, and volatility—from classic styles to modern features with bonus rounds. For big thrills, our jackpot section offers pools that grow with player activity. Table games are available in RNG format when you want a calm pace and familiar rules. Live casino is for players who want the real-table vibe: professional dealers, quality streams, and authentic interaction. We also feature interactive game shows that blend азарт with entertainment. The catalog makes it easy to browse by provider, new releases, and top picks. Many games include demo mode, letting you test mechanics and tempo without risk. We refresh collections regularly so you keep finding new experiences. On mobile, games load quickly and controls stay smooth. Betting limits vary by title, so you can match play to your bankroll. And if you enjoy competition, it’s easy to combine sessions with tournaments and leaderboards.


Core game categories

  • • Slots: classics and video slots, free spins, multipliers, bonus rounds.
  • • Jackpots: progressive and fixed jackpots with strong potential.
  • • Table Games (RNG): roulette, blackjack, baccarat, poker variants.
  • • Live Casino: live roulette, live blackjack, live baccarat with dealers.
  • • Game Shows: interactive, fast-paced entertainment formats.
  • • Demo Mode: try many games without real-money bets.

Minimum & Maximum Bets: Flexible Limits for Every Play Style

We support a broad betting range so you can play carefully or increase pace when you’re ready. Limits depend on the specific game and provider, which means you can always find a comfortable format for your bankroll. Slots make it easy to start low, while live games offer wider ranges for different experience levels. You can always view exact limits inside the game window before placing a bet.

Slots 0.10 100
Jackpots (slots) 0.10 100

RNG Blackjack 1 1,000
RNG Baccarat 1 1,000

Live Baccarat 1 5,000

Tournaments & Leaderboards: How to Join, Earn Points, and Claim Prizes

Our tournaments and leaderboards are built for players who enjoy competition and rewards for active play. Participation usually starts automatically when you play event-eligible titles or click to join in the tournaments section. Points follow a clear logic: wager volume, number of spins, and sometimes pace within the event window are taken into account. Some events also award extra points for bonus-round triggers or mission completion when tournaments are task-based. The more consistent your play during the event, the higher your шанс to climb the leaderboard. You can track your position in real time in the leaderboard section, where points and rank are displayed. We keep tournaments dynamic with short evening sprints and longer weekly events. When an event ends, results lock in and prizes are awarded based on final placement. Cash rewards are typically credited to your balance, while free spins appear in the bonus area with usage terms. If account verification is required, it helps you receive winnings quickly and securely. We recommend choosing a comfortable bet level and maintaining a steady rhythm to earn points confidently.


Quick tips

  • • How to join: play eligible games or press “Join” in the tournament.
  • • How points work: typically bet/wager volume, spins count, event time window.
  • • How to rank higher: consistent sessions, steady volume, faster-cycle games.
  • • How to claim prizes: prizes are credited automatically after the event ends.
  • • Where to track rank: Leaderboards/Hall of Fame with live updates.

items.title: Can I play for free?
items.answer: Yes, many games include demo mode so you can test mechanics and pace before real-money play.

items.title: How fast do bonuses activate?
items.answer: Bonuses typically activate right after you meet the requirement (such as a deposit), and they appear in your account bonus section.

items.title: How do limits and self-control tools work?
items.answer: You can set deposit limits and play restrictions, plus enable time-outs or self-exclusion to keep a comfortable pace.

items.title: Why is verification sometimes required?
items.answer: It’s a standard security measure to protect your account and payouts, meet financial requirements, and prevent abuse.

items.title: Can I join multiple promotions at once?
items.answer: Often yes, but compatibility depends on specific terms; the promo section shows which offers can be combined.
